loop1.title: Voltage Live Health
loop1.note: Showing voltage average and deviation; unbalance metric uses neutral-to-phase ratio as a proxy since per-phase voltage unbalance is not directly measured.

loop1.title: Current Live Health
loop1.note: The asset's column basket does not contain harmonic or THD columns (harmonic_3rd_pct, thd_voltage_r_pct, etc.), so this card cannot render real data for its assigned story angle.
